allowedExceptions: textual discussion about retired specs-main that is not executable authority
forbiddenPatterns: proposal package definition located under active specs-main/
build authority pointing to specs-main/default.nix or specs-main/packages/**
rationale: Final SSOT is specsless; governance-records and generated feat inputs carry package/build authority. Future proposals should not reopen specs-main as active authority.
rule: Any proposal that introduces, restores, depends on, or treats active specs-main/ as package, build, projection, requiredCommands, or authority input is not admissible. It should be rejected or quarantined rather than merged into active root.
scope: all future proposal merge/admission decisions after this SSOT
